verdict: An energetic chart that matches the song's chaotic humor, but suffers from physically impossible hold patterns and excessive 16th-note jump streams for a Hard rating.

issues.problem: Physically impossible jump. While holding R (from 46.254 to 46.734), the player is forced to jump LD at 46.494. This requires a highly advanced bracket on one side while holding the other, which is inappropriate for a Hard chart.
Unplayable step. The player is holding R (until 50.933) and U (until 51.053) simultaneously, but is prompted to tap D at 50.813, which is physically impossible with only two feet.
Awkward rapid lateral flow. Tapping L (15.544) then R (15.664) as a 16th-note transition is highly uncomfortable and forces a double-step or an intense hip twist.
Overly dense stream. The continuous 16th-note stream from 69.407 to 70.607 containing mid-stream jumps (LR at 69.527 and DR at 70.487) spikes the difficulty too high for this level.
